description: You are an exercise physiologist at the National Endurance Performance Lab logged into wger fitness manager at http://localhost (username: admin, password: adminadmin). Your client, an elite marathon runner, needs a full 16-week spring periodization program set up in the system. Using the detailed program specification at /home/ga/Documents/marathon_periodization_plan.txt, log the athlete's 8-week body weight history, create the two physiological measurement categories with their historical data, build the 16-week periodized training routine (including all four phases, training days with correct day-of-week assignments, and specified exercises), and create the competition-phase nutrition plan with all daily macro targets. All entries, names, values, and assignments must exactly match the

metadata.expected_routine_description: Elite marathon runner spring race preparation: Base, Build, Peak, Taper phases
